headlines.description: — Anyone who watched the Atlanta Falcons over the past few seasons could recognize their biggest shortcoming.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cousins throws 3 TD passes, 1st-place Falcons hand Cowboys 3rd straight loss, 27-21

headlines.description: — Tyler Bass tuned out the doubts, the ongoing questions about his consistency and the most recent challenge to his job.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bass' 61-yard field goal gives Allen and Bills a thrilling 30-27 win over Tagovailoa and Dolphins

events.name: Las Vegas Raiders at Cincinnati Bengals

headlines.description: — Joe Burrow was terrific, and Chase Brown had a big day on the ground. Trey Hendrickson provided a lift on defense.
headlines.shortLinkText: Burrow ties career high with 5 TD passes as Bengals get first home win, 41-24 over Raiders

events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at Cleveland Browns

headlines.description: — Justin Herbert and the Los Angeles Chargers only needed to be half as good to beat the Browns.
headlines.shortLinkText: Justin Herbert throws 2 TD passes, Chargers clamp down on Jameis Winston in 27-10 win over Browns

events.name: New England Patriots at Tennessee Titans

headlines.description: — Mason Rudolph told first-year Titans coach Brian Callahan not to worry after a rookie quarterback's amazing play with no time left to force overtime.
headlines.shortLinkText: Nick Folk's 25-yard field goal in OT helps Titans edge the Pats 20-17

events.name: Washington Commanders at New York Giants

headlines.description: — Jayden Daniels didn't need to throw a Hail Mary on the final play — or do anything spectacular, really, to lead his Washington Commanders past the...
headlines.shortLinkText: Jayden Daniels leads Commanders to 27-22 win over Giants for their best start since 1996

events.name: New Orleans Saints at Carolina Panthers

headlines.description: — For the first time in 20 career NFL starts, Bryce Young lined up in the victory formation to take a snap to close out a Carolina Panthers win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chuba Hubbard runs for 2 TDs, Young leads winning drive as Panthers beat Saints 23-22

headlines.description: — It takes more than a couple missed practices to slow down Lamar Jackson.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jackson produces perfect passer rating, Henry scores 2 more TDs as Ravens rout Broncos 41-10

headlines.description: — Nakobe Dean is stockpiling what he calls “takeaway balls” in Philadelphia's linebackers room at its training complex.
headlines.shortLinkText: Saquon Barkley shines with backward leap, 2 touchdowns in Eagles' 28-23 win over Jaguars

events.name: Detroit Lions at Green Bay Packers

headlines.description: — In their first outdoor game of the season, the Detroit Lions showed they could thrive even in lousy conditions as they took command of the NFC North.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kerby Joseph's pick-6 helps Lions beat Packers 24-14 and take command of NFC North

events.name: Los Angeles Rams at Seattle Seahawks

headlines.description: — Demarcus Robinson had the undisputed highlight for the Rams on Sunday, a one-handed, 39-yard touchdown reception in overtime that gave Los Angeles a 26-20 victory over the Seattle...
headlines.shortLinkText: Demarcus Robinson's one-handed catch in OT gives Rams 26-20 win over Seahawks

headlines.description: — Wherever this strong start to the season winds up leading the Minnesota Vikings, it's clear that belief and resilience will be responsible for a significant measure of their success.
headlines.shortLinkText: Darnold throws 3 TD passes in 2nd half as Vikings overcome 3 turnovers to beat Flacco, Colts 21-13
